Uses of Class
com.bfo.json.JsonWriter

  • Uses of JsonWriter in com.bfo.json

    Methods in com.bfo.json that return JsonWriter
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    JsonWriter
    JsonWriter.setAllowNaN(boolean allow)
    Whether to allow NaN and Infinite values in the output.
    JsonWriter
    JsonWriter.setCborDiag(String option)
    Configure this JsonWriter to write CBOR-diag format.
    JsonWriter
    JsonWriter.setDoubleFormat(String format)
    The String format to use when formatting a double.
    JsonWriter
    JsonWriter.setFloatFormat(String format)
    The String format to use when formatting a float.
    JsonWriter
    JsonWriter.setIndent(int size)
    Set whether the output is pretty-printed with newlines and indenting.
    JsonWriter
    JsonWriter.setMaxArraySize(int size)
    Set the maximum number of items to print in an array.
    JsonWriter
    JsonWriter.setMaxStringLength(int size)
    Set the maximum length of a string.
    JsonWriter
    JsonWriter.setOutput(OutputStream out)
    Set the OutputStream to write to, encoding the text as UTF-8.
    JsonWriter
    JsonWriter.setOutput(Appendable out)
    Set the Appendable to write to
    JsonWriter
    JsonWriter.setOutput(ByteBuffer buf)
    Set the ByteBuffer to write to, encoding the text as UTF-8.
    JsonWriter
    JsonWriter.setOutput(CharBuffer buf)
    Set the CharBuffer to write to
    JsonWriter
    JsonWriter.setSorted(boolean sorted)
    Request that map keys are sorted before writing.
    JsonWriter
    JsonWriter.setSpaceAfterColon(boolean space)
    Set whether to add a space after colons when printing
    JsonWriter
    JsonWriter.setSpaceAfterComma(boolean space)
    Set whether to add a space after commas when printing.
    Methods in com.bfo.json with parameters of type JsonWriter
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    Json.toString(JsonWriter output)
    Return a String representation of this Json object, written using the specifed JsonWriter.
